verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes alleluia, Sometimes praise the Lord Sometimes gently singing, Our hearts in one accord (Alleluia! Alleluia!)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh let us lift our voices, Look toward the sky and start to sing Oh let us now return His love, Just let our voices ring Oh let us feel His presence, Let the sound of praises fill the air Oh let us sing the song of Jesus' love, To people everywhere.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh let our joy be unconfined, Let us sing with freedom unrestrained Let's take this feeling that we're feeling now, Outside these walls and let it rain. Oh let the Spirit overflow, As we are filled from head to toe. We love you Father, Son and Holy Ghost, And we want this world to know.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You can sing if you want to, Alleluia The angels are singing, alleluia Heaven is rejoicing, alleluia

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You can sing a little louder, alleluia The angels are singing, alleluia Heaven is rejoicing, alleluia Alleluia! Alleluia! Thank You, Jesus, Alleluia! Alleluia!
